page_content:
Repeatable to: 8 credits.

BISI701 Teaching & Professional Development in Biology (1 Credit) Provides graduate students in the biological sciences with the foundational knowledge to become better teaching assistants and gives them an introduction into the skills and tools that they need to develop as professional scientists and educators.

Cross-listed with: ENTM701.

Credit Only Granted for: ENTM701, BISI688Z, CBMG688Z, or BIOL701. Formerly: BISI688Z, CBMG688Z, BIOL701.

Additional Information: Priority enrollment will be given to students in the BISI Graduate Program.
